task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the target list proposal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/jwst_lensing_proposal.txt' showing the targets (Abell 1689, Abell 2218, Abell 370).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent points the telescope to the correct coordinates for the galaxy clusters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map centered on one of the target clusters, or the Ekos Mount module showing current coordinates matching the privileged information (e.g., RA ~13.19h / Dec ~-1.34° for Abell 1689).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures CCD pointing confirmation frames with the correct settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing an exposure time of '60' seconds and the 'Luminance' filter (or filter slot 1) selected, with a captured FITS image visible in the FITS viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent obtains high-resolution Hubble palette sky reference images for the targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars showing a HiPS/DSS sky overlay (preferably Hubble/HST) being viewed or exported, or an image viewer showing a saved optical sky image of the cluster regions.

task_completion.description: Verify the outputs are organized into per-target subdirectories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing directories named after the targets (e.g., 'Abell1689', 'Abell2218', 'Abell370') located inside the '~/Lensing/' base directory, containing the image files.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a final observation log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a log file (e.g., 'observation_log.txt') inside the '~/Lensing/' directory containing notes or records of the captured targets.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used KStars/Ekos to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the KStars/Ekos GUI being interacted with (e.g., capture sequences, mount controls). The agent should not just use terminal commands (like 'touch' or 'convert') to create dummy FITS/image files.

integrity.description: Ensure the sky reference and CCD frames contain actual astronomical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FITS viewer or image viewer should display actual star fields or noise patterns typical of astronomical images, not blank canvases, solid colors, or generic non-astronomy pictures.

integrity.description: Ensure the directory structure was created in the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager or terminal path must clearly show the files are in '/home/ga/Lensing' and not a mocked directory elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Coordinates (Tolerance 0.25°): Abell 1689 (RA 13.1917h, Dec -1.3411°), Abell 2218 (RA 16.5983h, Dec 66.2131°), Abell 370 (RA 2.6647h, Dec -1.5767°). Required Exposure Time: 60 seconds. Required Filter: 1 (Luminance). Base Output Directory: /home/ga/Lensing.
